Wash thoroughly after handling. Avoid breathing mist or vapour. Contaminated work clothing must Prevention

clothing/eye protection/face protection. Use only outdoors or in a well-ventilated area.

IF ON SKIN: Wash with plenty of soap and water. If skin irritation or rash occurs: Get medical
advice/attention. Take off contaminated clothing and wash it before reuse. IF IN EYES: Rinse
cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present and easy to do.
Continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists: Get medical advice/attention. IF INHALED: Remove
person to fresh air and keep comfortable for breathing. If experiencing respiratory symptoms: Call
a poison centre/doctor. IF exposed or concerned: Get medical advice/attention. Call a poison
